violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed handling phone, hat, hair and changing gloves without hand washing.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Clean upright freezers.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50 ppm chlorine. May use for washing and rinsing. Sanitizing needs to be completed in 3 compartment sink.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Store single serve items off the floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Deep clean floors in the kitchen. Clean the walk in cooler floors. Clean vents in the bathrooms.
